{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Korrina
|pkmn=Mienshao
|stage1=Mienfoo
|type1=Fighting
|img=Korrina Mienfoo.png
|img2=Korrina Mienshao.png

|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|vaennote=Mienshao
|desc={{p|Mienshao}} first appeared as a {{p|Mienfoo}}, which Korrina used as her first Pokémon during her [[Gym]] battle with {{Ash}}. It battled [[Ash's Hawlucha]]. Though it dealt lots of damage on Hawlucha due to Ash using {{an|Tierno}}'s strategies instead of his own, it was later defeated with a {{m|Flying Press}}.

In ''[[JN025|A Festival Reunion!]]'', it was revealed to have evolved into a Mienshao when it battled [[Ash's Gengar]] in the [[World Coronation Series]]. It was then defeated by {{AP|Dragonite}}.

Mienshao's known moves are {{m|High Jump Kick}}, {{m|Drain Punch}}, {{m|Force Palm}}, {{m|Swift}}, {{m|Acrobatics}}, {{m|U-turn}}, and {{m|Double Slap}}{{tt|*|Mienshao could not legally use Double Slap at the time}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Korrina

|type1=Fighting
|img=Korrina Machoke.png
|epnum=XY044

|desc={{p|Machoke}} was used as Korrina's second Pokémon during her Gym battle with Ash. It battled [[Ash's Fletchinder]], and although it was very speedy and had powerful attacks, it was defeated with a {{m|Flame Charge}}.

Machoke's known moves are {{m|Brick Break}}, {{m|Low Sweep}}, and {{m|Focus Blast}}.}}
